name: Who Needs a Hero?
short_description: A stick and a dream: that's all you need in an RPG. Make choices that shape your destiny, build relationships, face epic monsters, and choose between being a feared villain or a legend.
detailed_description:
A stick and a dream, that's all you need...

Every choice you make can lead to glory or ruin—will you become a legend or just another forgotten hero? Adventure awaits those who dare to shape the Kingdom's destiny!

◈ Choose Wisely

Every decision you make affects your fame, wealth, followers, and the Kingdom's future. Your choices are more than simple paths; they weave together to shape a unique storyline and outcomes that define your heroic (or villainous) reputation.

◈ Customize Your Home and Collect Panties

As you gain fame, transform your home with unique items, trophies, and collections that showcase your legendary achievements. Collect rare items—including coveted "panties"—to earn prestigious titles and attract admirers, building the ultimate hero’s abode.

◈ Battle Monsters, Gods, and Other Players

Face off against mythical beasts, deities, and even rival players in a tactical, tabletop-inspired RPG system. Roll the dice, wield special items, and harness your skills to conquer every challenge. Prove yourself as the mightiest hero in epic battles that reward strategy as much as strength.

◈ Make Good Deals

With every coin you earn, seek out merchants for essential items, potions, and sweets—or venture into the black market, where followers become currency. Barter wisely, for every deal could bring rare treasures that enhance your powers and reputation.

◈ Ride Dragons, Pigs, and Mystical Creatures

From fearsome dragons to loyal pigs, tame a variety of mythical creatures to accompany you on your journey. Brave enough to unleash a Cerberus from the gates of hell? Build your legendary fleet and prove yourself a master of all creatures.

◈ Karma System

Your actions determine the path of a hero or anti-hero, affecting storylines and events in unexpected ways. With each decision, shape the Kingdom's view of you as a noble champion or a rogue with questionable morals. Your karma will decide the fate of the world around you.

◈ Followers’ Chat

Engage directly with your followers through a unique AI-powered chat. Share tales, receive advice, and inspire loyalty, all while using advanced AI to create engaging and dynamic interactions that make every follower feel real.

◈ A Unique and Unexpected Storyline

Dive into an adventure filled with stories never imagined before, where the unpredictable is just the beginning. Each quest delivers epic and humorous twists, creating a journey unlike any other. From drama to laughter, every chapter is crafted to surprise, making you eager to discover what’s next!

◈ Medieval Fantasy Art 2D

Immerse yourself in a beautifully crafted medieval fantasy world, where each visual detail transports you into a magical and vibrant universe. With enchanting landscapes, mythical creatures, and lively characters, the game’s art combines the classic with the unexpected, offering a visual experience that perfectly complements your epic journey.

◈ Famous Inspirations and References

Each character in the game is inspired by iconic figures from popular games and anime, adding a layer of familiarity and fun for true fans. Spot the subtle nods to legendary heroes, mythical creatures, and epic villains from across the worlds of anime and gaming. Think you can recognize them all? Join the adventure and see if you’re up for the challenge!

Contact us:
